input:
Classify the following text into exactly one of: NDA, Lease, Contract, Statute, CaseLaw, Other. Respond with only the label.

Text: "This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (the \"Agreement\") is entered into as of the Effective Date by and between the parties identified below."

Classify the following text into exactly one of: NDA, Lease, Contract, Statute, CaseLaw, Other. Respond with only the label.

Text: "Landlord hereby leases to Tenant the premises located at 12 King's Road, London, for an initial term of twelve (12) months commencing on 1 June."

Classify the following text into exactly one of: NDA, Lease, Contract, Statute, CaseLaw, Other. Respond with only the label.

Text: "This Master Services Agreement governs the supply of consulting services. Each Statement of Work issued under this Agreement shall be subject to its terms."

Classify the following text into exactly one of: NDA, Lease, Contract, Statute, CaseLaw, Other. Respond with only the label.

Text: "Section 230 of the Communications Decency Act, 47 U.S.C. § 230, provides limited federal immunity to providers and users of interactive computer services."

Classify the following text into exactly one of: NDA, Lease, Contract, Statute, CaseLaw, Other. Respond with only the label.

Text: "Donoghue v Stevenson [1932] AC 562 established the modern tort of negligence in the United Kingdom and the neighbour principle articulated by Lord Atkin."

Classify the following text into exactly one of: NDA, Lease, Contract, Statute, CaseLaw, Other. Respond with only the label.

Text: "This is the fourth-quarter earnings call transcript discussing year-over-year revenue growth and updated guidance for the coming fiscal year."

Classify the following text into exactly one of: NDA, Lease, Contract, Statute, CaseLaw, Other. Respond with only the label.

Text: "The receiving party shall hold the Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent."

Route the following user request to exactly one of: contract_review, case_research, drafting, billing, escalation. Respond with only the route name.

Request: "Can you compare the indemnification clause in version 3 of the contract against version 2 and flag any new exposure?"

Route the following user request to exactly one of: contract_review, case_research, drafting, billing, escalation. Respond with only the route name.

Request: "Find recent UK High Court decisions on Article 8 ECHR privacy claims involving employer monitoring."

Route the following user request to exactly one of: contract_review, case_research, drafting, billing, escalation. Respond with only the route name.

Request: "Please draft a termination-for-convenience notice in line with our standard template."
